name: @openclaw/baiying-enhance
description: Baiying-style dynamic agent registration and dispatch for OpenClaw

scripts.build: esbuild index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outfile=dist/index.js --sourcemap --external:openclaw --external:minio --loader:.md=text && esbuild src/aimodel-secret-resolver-cli.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --target=node20 --outfile=dist/aimodel-secret-resolver-cli.js --sourcemap --banner:js='import { createRequire } from "node:module"; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);'
